name: What's the time limit to claim hearing loss from noisy job in Utah? I'm in Salt Lake City and just noticed it.
description: 1 year from last injurious exposure in Utah—file now if close, as it's strict for gradual noise loss.[2]

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to claim hearing loss from noisy job in Utah? I'm in Salt Lake City and just noticed it.

acceptedAnswer.text: 1 year from last injurious exposure in Utah—file now if close, as it's strict for gradual noise loss.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, you have 1 year from the date of accident or last injurious noise exposure to file a workers' comp claim for occupational hearing loss.[2] For gradual loss like at factories or mines, this starts from your last significant workplace noise day.[2] Key factors: Short 1-year SOL is strict; delayed symptoms don't extend it, medical diagnosis date may not reset clock.[2][1] Track last exposure date precisely, file with Utah Labor Commission promptly, gather audiograms and job records.[2] A lawyer can help preserve your claim if near deadline.[2]
